creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: jhujhiti it looks good so far.  Do you think you could also add regression tests to tests/sys/netinet/fibs_test.sh?  You can probably just mirror the logic in the existing loopback_and_network_routes_on_nondefault_fib, default_route_with_multiple_fibs_on_same_subnet, same_ip_multiple_ifaces_fib0, and subnet_route_with_multiple_fibs_on_same_subnet tests.
